title: Earnings call transcript: Root Inc. Q2 2025 sees earnings beat, stock dip
text: Root reported Q2 2025 earnings with an earnings per share (EPS) of $1.29 against a forecast of $0.52, and revenue of $382.9 million compared to the anticipated $354.35 million. Record high in gross earned premiums of $371 million was achieved. Net Income of $22 million, up $30 million year-over-year, Operating Income of $27 million, up $24 million year-over-year, and Adjusted EBITDA of $38 million, up $26 million year-over-year. Root's continued strong performance demonstrates the effectiveness of its technology-driven approach. The partnership channel showed exceptional growth with new writings more than tripled year-over-year in some segments. Root's AI pricing model delivered improved customer lifetime values. The company's combined ratio remained below target levels, indicating strong underwriting profitability. Root's market expansion continued with new state filings and increasing geographic reach. Management expressed confidence in achieving full-year profitability targets. The independent agent channel emerged as a significant growth opportunity, with Root expanding distribution capabilities.
